content.query:
CREATE VIEW BI_Inventory
--drop view BI_Inventory
AS

SELECT
    ML.ITNO AS [Item Number],
    ML.WHLO AS [Warehouse],
    MF.APPR AS [Average Cost],
    ML.STQT AS [Qty on Hand],
    ML.REQT AS [Qty on Reserve],
    ML.ALQT AS [Qty Allocated],
    ML.SSQT AS [Qty on Safety Stock],
    ML.QUQT AS [Qty on Inspection],
    ML.RJQT AS [Qty Rejected],
    ML.BUYE AS [Buyer],
    ML.MXST AS [Maximun Stock],
    ML.LOQT AS [Minimum Order Qty],
    ML.REOP AS [Reorder Point]
FROM M3.MITBAL ML
LEFT JOIN M3.MITFAC MF ON ML.ITNO = MF.ITNO AND MF.FACI = 'TLC'
